steps.title: Apply the simplification from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $x+4 = 29$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. Subtracting $4\left(x+4\right)$ from both sides of the given equation yields $1\left(x+4\right)=29$, or $x+4=29$. Therefore, the value of $x+4$ is $29$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of $x$, not $x+4$.
